subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! My Name, the Most Beauteous, hath made mention of thee and hath beseeched from the Most Holy Court that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی اسمی جمال ترا ذکر نمود و از ساحت اقدس طلبید آنچه را
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
